name: Redis Streams Monitor
description: Monitor a Redis Stream for new entries and trigger jobs when entries are detected

triggers.description: Triggers when new entries are detected in the monitored Redis Stream

outputs.description: Passes entry information (stream_name, entry_id, fields, host, port) to triggered jobs via run_config

stream_name.label: Stream Name
stream_name.description: Name of the Redis Stream to monitor

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when entries are detected

password_env_var.label: Password Env Var
password_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Redis password

use_tls.label: Use TLS
use_tls.description: Whether to use TLS for the Redis connection

max_entries_per_poll.label: Max Entries Per Poll
max_entries_per_poll.description: Maximum number of stream entries to read per evaluation

start_from_beginning.label: Start From Beginning
start_from_beginning.description: On first run, read from the beginning of the stream. If false, only reads entries that arrive after the sensor starts.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
